prose: Water HOMO–LUMO frontier orbital gap computed via DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz (single-point, no re-optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV. Gap = 8.9406687 eV. The Koopmans-style orbital energies report vertical ionization/electron affinities, not excitation energies. All integrity checks passed.
